'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 20''' was the twentieth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[May 15]], [[2002]]. The issue was authored by [[Andrew Darling]], [[Chris Gardner]], [[Iain Lowson]] and [[Jim Swallow]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*[[Great Sith War/Legends|The Sith War]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]]
*[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]]
*[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] Pilots
*[[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]]
*[[Labor droid/Legends|Labour Droids]]
*[[Ion blaster/Legends|Ion Blaster]]
*[[Swoop/Legends|Swoop Bikes]]
